sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77977" key="para/zeucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρά-ζευξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77977.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yoking beside, coupling</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1109f</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
